powpow

  • Index
Search:
Group by:
  • Imports
  • Exports

powpow — High-performance event notification library for Nim.

This is the main entry point. Importing powpow gives you everything:

import powpow

let loop = newLoop() loop.register(fd, {Read}, proc(fd: int, ev: setEventType) = echo "fd ", fd, " is readable!" ) loop.run()

Imports

powpow/types, powpow/platform, powpow/loop, powpow/net, powpow/proto
